characters.name: Alice Wartheimer
characters.description: Alice WartheimerFull NameAlice WartheimerNickname(s)Alice WheezehimerWheezyAlice in Wheezerland (by Hugo)GenderFemaleAge18-19OccupationStudentGrocery Clerk (formerly)Eye ColorHazelHair ColorDark blondeRelationships & AffiliationsFriendsTeddy DuncanEnemiesHugoSchoolSouth High SchoolAffiliationsReddi Mart (formerly)ProductionFirst EpisodeCharlie Did It!Last EpisodeSleepless in Denver Grocery Clerk (formerly) Alice Wartheimer(portrayed by Hayley Holmes) is a very sweet, but high-strung and submissive girl from Teddy's French class who was an employee at the Reddi Mart until she was fired. Through theepisode, it is revealed that she suffers from asthma, so whenever getting nervous or excited, Alice hyperventilates, earning names like "AliceWheezeheimer", "Wheezy", or her rude former boss Hugo's, "Alice in Wheezerland". Alice believed that she had to let Hugo treat her badly due to being his subordinate, but when Teddy inspires her to stand up for herself, she is fired, but happy that she stayed strong and made a new (and possibly her only) friend.

characters.name: Austin
characters.description: AustinGenderMaleAge11Resides inDenver, ColoradoRelationships & AffiliationsRomancesTeddy Duncan(crush on his side)ProductionOnly EpisodeTeddy ReboundsPortrayed ByNathan Gamble Austin practically was Gabe's best friend, but when he first sets his eyes on Teddy, he's in love. Teddy gets annoyed when Austin keeps insisting her as his girlfriend, and he uses music to get Teddy. Gabe gets silly about Austin thinking Teddy wants to have a relationship with him, and Teddy gets out of shape because she wants Austin to understand that she just got out of a relationship with Spencer, and she deals with his concepts. He was mentioned inCharlie is 2!when Gabe said he was bragging about his new dog.

characters.name: Bert Doogan
characters.description: Bert DooganFull NameBert DooganGenderMaleRelationships & AffiliationsRomancesMrs. Dobbs(wife)FriendsBob DuncanPJ DuncanProductionFirst EpisodeThe Charlie WhispererLast EpisodeWeekend in VegasPortrayed ByDan Desmond Bert Doogan is a neighbor of the Duncans'. He lives on Edgewood Drive. He is very grumpy and he barely knows his neighbors (Rock Enroll). He used to be a mailman (The Charlie Whisperer). Gabe faked that Bert used to be an astronaut. He is portrayed by Dan Desmond.

characters.name: Petunia Blankenhooper
characters.description: Petunia BlankenhooperGenderFemaleDate of Birthc. 1945-1950Age70s-80sResides inPalm Springs, CaliforniaRelationships & AffiliationsFamilyAmy Duncan(daughter)Jamie Blankenhooper(daughter)Bob Duncan(son-in-law)PJ Duncan(grandson)Teddy Duncan(granddaughter)Gabe Duncan(grandson)Charlie Duncan(granddaughter)Toby Duncan(grandson)Gabe Duncan Jr.(great-grandson)RomancesHank Blankenhooper(husband)ProductionOnly EpisodeGood Luck Charlie, It's Christmas!Portrayed ByDebra MonkPetunia BlankenhooperisCharlie,Teddy,Toby,GabeandPJ's maternal grandmother. She isAmy's mother, wife ofHank Blankenhooperand Bob's mother-in-law. She did mention that she does not have a computer, does not know how to work a VCR and doesn't have a DVD player. She calls and talks to Teddy and Charlie, while Amy and Gabe avoid her phone calls. Gabe refuses to because of it not being Christmas or his birthday, and Amy just leaves, saying that she isn't in the room ("Bye Bye Video Diary"). Evidently, she must've gotten a computer and learned how to use the internet, because she has a Buddy Page ("Alley Oops"). Whenever Amy had a problem, she used to tell her to get over it and deal with it ("Girl Bites Dog"). Jamie Blankenhooper(daughter)Bob Duncan(son-in-law)PJ Duncan(grandson)Teddy Duncan(granddaughter)Gabe Duncan(grandson)Charlie Duncan(granddaughter)Toby Duncan(grandson)Gabe Duncan Jr.(great-grandson) InGood Luck Charlie, It's Christmas!, when the family comes to her house for a Christmas vacation, she constantly blames Bob for stuff that's out of his control with his children (mostly Charlie's rambunctious behavior). After Charlie ruins her glass reindeer collection, she blames Bob and locks him in the guest room for a "time-out", but after Teddy and Amy call for help to get to her house, she lets him go with the boys to help them out while leaving Charlie in her care. She then notices Charlie's behavior when she's messing something up in front of her and at the end of the movie, she forgives Bob, telling him "Well, I know one thing you're good at, making beautiful babies". She says this and hugs her daughter after it's revealed that another baby (Toby) will soon be born.

characters.name: Bob Diddlebock
characters.description: Bob DiddlebockGenderMaleRelationships & AffiliationsRomancesAmy Duncan(ex-girlfriend)Jamie Blankenhooper(possible girlfriend) Bob Diddlebock is a minor character inGood Luck Charlie. He is never seen, although he is mentioned many times throughout the series, and he is heard honking his car atJamie BlankenhooperinSister, Sister. Bob wasAmy's boyfriend during the time she andBob Duncanwere broken up, and they both went to high school with Bob Duncan.

characters.name: Brandon
characters.description: BrandonFull NameBrandonGenderMaleProductionFirst EpisodeSnow Show, Part OneLast EpisodeSnow Show, Part Two Brandonis a teenage guy whoTeddymeets and thinks is the love of her life, but comes to realize that he isn't, as he's a mama's boy, stating that his mother is prettier thanTeddyandIvy. He is portrayed by Jordan Nichols.

characters.name: Brock
characters.description: BrockGenderMaleAge15-16Relationships & AffiliationsRomancesSkyler(ex-girlfriend)Teddy Duncan(crush)FriendsSkyler,PJEnemiesPJ(formerly)AffiliationsWrestling TeamSouth High SchoolProductionOnly EpisodeTeddy's Bear Brockis the former boyfriend ofSkyler. characters.name: Captain Stretchy
characters.description: Captain StretchyFull NameCaptain StretchyGenderMaleProductionOnly EpisodeBaby Come Back Captain Stretchyis a "superhero" PJ met inBaby Come Back, the second episode of Good Luck Charlie. He helped them in finding Emma after PJ mixed up the babies at the park while taking Charlie on a stroll in the park. Also, he is known to make a lot of mistakes. Captain Stretchy isn't all that stretchy, and his logo came off at the dry cleaners. He once saw a coin, and he leaned over to pick it up, but he couldn't.

characters.description: Corporal KwikkiGenderMaleOccupationCreator ofKwikki ChikkiestablishmentsRelationships & AffiliationsAffiliationsKwikki Chikki Corporal Bull S. Kwikkiis the creator ofKwikki Chikkiestablishments. He is from New Jersey. In a commercial, he has a horse named Curly Fry, and he loves curly fries in reality. PJ hired his teacher, Mr. Kern, to be Corporal Kwikki in the episodeThe Break Upto convinceMitchto give PJ and the rest of the former employees their jobs back.

characters.name: Miss Covington
characters.description: Ms. CovingtonGenderFemaleDate of Birth1956OccupationGym TeacherEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlondeRelationships & AffiliationsAffiliationsSouth High SchoolProductionOnly EpisodeDouble WhammyPortrayed ByStephanie Hodge Miss Covingtonis the gym teacher atSouth High School. She has also studied at the same school. She is portrayed byStephanie Hodge. The teacher is a strongwilled woman that knows how to educate her students. She was the best 'whammy' (the ram, mascotte) on the school, Teddy's mother was second.

characters.description: Debbie DooleyFull NameDebbie DooleyGenderFemaleOccupationMotherHair ColorBlondeRelationships & AffiliationsFamilyDeedee Dooley(Daughter)Dexter Dooley(Son)RomancesDoug Dooley(Husband)FriendsAmy DuncanProductionFirst EpisodeMonkey BusinessLast EpisodeGood Bye CharliePortrayed ByEricka Kreutz Debbie Dooleyis the mother ofDeedee DooleyandDexter Dooley. She is also the wife ofDoug Dooley. She moved near the Duncans, Dabneys, andMr. Dixonfrom Iowa. She speaks with a strongUpper Midwestern accent, which annoysAmy, with whom she is very competitive. She and her husband are protective of their daughter, Deedee. They installed aNanny Camin the house to check up on her,Charlie Duncan, and babysittersTeddy DuncanandIvy Wentz.

characters.description: DeeDee DooleyFull NameDeborah DooleyGenderFemaleDate of Birthc. 2009Relationships & AffiliationsFamilyDebbie Dooley(mother)Doug Dooley(father)Dexter Dooley(younger brother)FriendsCharlie DuncanAffiliationsCharlie Duncan, Pre-schoolProductionFirst EpisodeMonkey BusinessLast EpisodeCharlie 4, Toby 1Portrayed ByUnknown (???) Deedee Dooleyis a four-year-old child who happens to beCharlie Duncan's friend. She moved near the Duncans, Dabneys andMr. Dixonfrom Iowa. She is a member of a very rich family. Her parents supervise her with aNanny Cam. She went with Charlie, Teddy, and Ivy to Make a Monkey. She is the older sister ofDexter Dooley. Deedee has blonde hair, with just a little brown, and is 2'11".

characters.name: Amy Duncan
characters.description: Amy DuncanFull NameAmy Black Blankenhooper-DuncanNickname(s)BlankenhooperGenderFemaleDate of Birthc. 1970 (age 55)Age40-41 (Season 1)41-42 (Season 2)42-43 (Season 3)43-44 (Season 4)52-53 (Futuredrama)Resides in358 Edgewood Drive, Denver, ColoradoOccupationRegistered Nurse (formerly)School Nurse inNurse Blankenhooper(formerly)Co-Host on Good Morning Denver (currently)Eye ColorBlueHair ColorBlondeRelationships & AffiliationsFamilyPetunia Blankenhooper(mother)Hank Blankenhooper(father)Jamie Blankenhooper(twin sister)PJ Duncan(oldest son)Teddy Duncan(oldest daughter)Gabe Duncan(second oldest son)Charlie Duncan(younger daughter)Toby Duncan(youngest son)Gabe Duncan Jr.(grandson)Linda Duncan(mother-in-law)Frank Duncan(father-in-law)Mel Duncan(uncle-in-law)Stanley Duncan (uncle-in-law)Patrick John Duncan(grandfather-in-law)RomancesBob Duncan(husband)Bob Diddlebock(ex-boyfriend)FriendsMary Lou WentzDebbie DooleyEstelle DabneyEnemiesKaren WilkerFran CulpepperJamie Blankenhooper(formerly)SchoolSouth High School(graduated in the 1980s)Southwest Denver Community College (Graduated)ProductionFirst EpisodeStudy DateLast EpisodeGood Bye Charlie(Good Luck, Teddy)Portrayed ByLeigh-Allyn Baker 40-41 (Season 1)41-42 (Season 2)42-43 (Season 3)43-44 (Season 4)52-53 (Futuredrama) Southwest Denver Community College (Graduated) Amy Duncan is the wife ofBob Duncanand mother ofPJ, Teddy, Gabe, Charlie, and Toby. She's a nurse and went back to work after Charlie was born, although at one point she was nervous about leaving Charlie alone with the rest of the family ("Study Date"). She is just like any other mother in the world. She loves and cares about her family, and entrusts them with their baby, Charlie. But at times she is shown to be quite self-centered. She also tries to be the star of the family most of the time. It is also shown to overwork, which causes her to talk baby-like even when Charlie's not around. Because of this, Teddy tells her that they need a break from Charlie and that they should go on a date. Amy takes Teddy's advice and goes to a Mexican restaurant along with Bob. ("Baby Come Back"). Amy hires a pretend family in a show in her work to beat her work mate Fran which shows that Amy Duncan is embarrassed by her family and their lack of talent ("The Singin' Dancin' Duncan's"). Amy is a very busy woman but is very easy to live with. Amy is occasionally shown to be a bit of a genius, but most of the time she is very smart and can be quite sarcastic and outspoken (iq 89898). She is also highly competitive, even over trivial things and less special opportunities, such as being on TV or singing in front of a group ("Kwikki Chick", "Charlie Goes Viral", "Charlie Shakes It Up!"). She is also often shown to be strict in several episodes. Amy loves the camera and the stage and often goes crazy trying to be in anything that has to do with acting or being in front of a camera.

characters.description: Bob DuncanFull NameRobert William DuncanGenderMaleDate of Birthc. 1968 (age 57)Age42-43 (Season 1)43-44 (Season 2)44-45 (Season 3)45-46 (Season 4)54-55 (Futuredrama)Resides in358 Edgewood Drive, Denver, ColoradoOccupationExterminatorEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlondeRelationships & AffiliationsFamilyLinda Duncan(mother)Frank Duncan(father)PJ Duncan(oldest son)Teddy Duncan(older daughter)Gabe Duncan(second oldest son)Charlie Duncan(younger daughter)Toby Duncan(youngest son)Gabe Duncan Jr.(grandson)Mel Duncan(paternal uncle)Stanley Duncan (uncle)Patrick John Duncan(grandfather)Petunia Blankenhooper(mother-in-law)Hank Blankenhooper(father-in-law)Jamie Blankenhooper(sister-in-law)RomancesKatherine Davis(ex-girlfriend)Amy Duncan(wife)FriendsVernDoug DooleyHarry WentzBeau LandryRandy Shelbie(on his side)Bruce (formerly)EnemiesMurraySchoolSouth High School(graduated in 1980s)AffiliationsBob's Bugs Be Gone(owner)ProductionPortrayed ByEric Allan KramerJason Dolley(as 16-year-old Bob in a 1988 video inDouble Whammy) 42-43 (Season 1)43-44 (Season 2)44-45 (Season 3)45-46 (Season 4)54-55 (Futuredrama) Robert "Bob" William Duncanis the patriarch of the Duncan family. characters.name: Elaine
characters.description: ElaineFull NameElaineRelationships & AffiliationsFamilyBrittany(daughter)EnemiesAmy DuncanProductionOnly EpisodeKwikki ChickPortrayed ByLauren Bowles Elaine isBrittany's mom, Brittany goes to the same day care asCharlie. When Elaine meetsAmy, they both get very competitive. She did her first and only appearance inKwikki Chick. She is portrayed by Lauren Bowles.
